headlines.headline: Jaguars RB Chris Rodriguez (foot) expected for training camp
headlines.description: Jaguars running back Chris Rodriguez Jr. remains sidelined as he recovers from offseason surgery on his left foot, but is expected to return in time for training camp.

headlines.headline: Hilary Knight signs with Vegas in first step of trade to Detroit
headlines.description: Hilary Knight signed a one-year foundational contract offer with the PWHL's expansion team in Las Vegas on Tuesday in the first step that will eventually land the five-time U.S. Olympian in the Motor City.

headlines.headline: Plano approves funding plan for potential Dallas Stars arena
headlines.description: The Plano City Council approved using $700 million in public money toward building what is a roughly $1 billion project at The Shops of Willow Bend.

headlines.headline: Edmonton Oilers nearing deal with Mike Babcock, sources say
headlines.description: The Edmonton Oilers are closing in on a contract that would make Mike Babcock, 63, who won a Stanley Cup in 2008 with the Detroit Red Wings and is 12th all time in NHL career victories, their next head coach, multiple sources confirmed to ESPN on Monday.
